patterns.signature: commit batch took <N>ms (fsync per batch); consumer_lag=<N>
slow consumer: ed-olapdb-mt-1-metric-iq ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage=<N>s and rising
producer backpressure: ed-olapdb-mt-1-metric-iq near capacity, SQS ChangeMessageVisibility failing

note: http-receiver has the HIGHEST count (9100) and PAGED with a latency+traffic spike. But the EARLIEST signal is the consumer metric-ingestor-1's slow commit (03:12:00) and rising queue age, BEFORE the producer backpressure (03:17:10) and the edge 429s (03:20:10). The edge spike is backpressure propagating UP the chain — the OPPOSITE of the request-flow direction.
